name: pinned-v1
_note: Anchor-lane protocol: reader/judge chosen for comparability with the peer-reviewed Mem0-paper numbers (arXiv 2504.19413). The hardened cross-family judge lane (claude-* judge) is pinned as pinned-v2 only AFTER adversarial judge validation publishes its confusion tables — until then any cross-family score is an estimate by construction. Any deviation from the fields below machine-labels a run 'estimate' (SPEC firewall).
